rollback.command: Set the prior deployment live and disable the rollout target.

stages.name: 10-percent
exitCriteria: Redis and database saturation remain within budget.
Presence service joins and worker-plane ingress remain healthy.

stages.name: 50-percent
entryCriteria: Auth, hub, workspace, and messages remain stable.
exitCriteria: Worker-plane traffic remains isolated from shell latency.

notes: Keep this file environment-specific and update statuses as the rollout advances.
Track presence service and worker-plane health explicitly during each canary stage.
